LanguageData.BeverageMachineA.description: A beverage machine for store operations. It can centrally store and manage beverages sold in the shop, facilitating restocking and settlement.
LanguageData.BeverageMachineA.label: Beverage Machine A
LanguageData.BeverageMachineB.description: A beverage machine for store operations. It can centrally store and manage beverages sold in the shop, facilitating restocking and settlement.
LanguageData.BeverageMachineB.label: Beverage Machine B
LanguageData.BigBeverageStorageBox.description: A large beverage cabinet for store operations. It can centrally store and manage beverages sold in the shop, facilitating restocking and settlement.
LanguageData.BigBeverageStorageBox.label: Large Beverage Cabinet
LanguageData.BigStorageBox.description: A large cabinet for store operations. It can centrally store and manage goods sold in the shop, facilitating restocking and settlement.
LanguageData.BigStorageBox.label: Large Cabinet
LanguageData.ClothesStorageBox.description: A large cabinet for store operations. It can centrally store and manage goods sold in the shop, facilitating restocking and settlement.
LanguageData.ClothesStorageBox.label: Large Clothing Cabinet
LanguageData.FoodStorageBoxA.description: A food cabinet for store operations. It can centrally store and manage food sold in the shop, facilitating restocking and settlement.
LanguageData.FoodStorageBoxA.label: Food Cabinet A
LanguageData.FoodStorageBoxB.description: A food cabinet for store operations. It can centrally store and manage food sold in the shop, facilitating restocking and settlement.
LanguageData.FoodStorageBoxB.label: Food Cabinet B
LanguageData.RSMF_CollectibleDisplayStand.description: A large display stand for showing simulation management framework collectibles. Multiple display slots can be configured via the management panel, and pawns can carry collectibles from the map to the stand.
LanguageData.RSMF_CollectibleDisplayStand.label: Collectible Display Stand
LanguageData.RSMF_Collections_EngineeringDrawing.desc: A detailed engineering drawing related to city construction.
LanguageData.RSMF_Collections_GoldCube.description: A cube made of pure gold, as if magical, it attracts attention involuntarily, but it is said to be a replica, far from the effect of the genuine one.
LanguageData.RSMF_Collections_GoldCube.label: Golden Cube
LanguageData.RSMF_Collections_GoldenToilet.descriptio: A toilet made of gold and marble. Sitting on it will continuously drain psychic energy until it is completely drained and turns to ash. This is of course false.
LanguageData.RSMF_Collections_GoldenToilet.label: Golden Toilet
LanguageData.RSMF_Collections_HoneydrewMelon.descript: A large green honeydew melon, weighing fifteen jin.
LanguageData.RSMF_Collections_HoneydrewMelon.label: Honeydew Melon
LanguageData.RSMF_Collections_LazyFish.description: A lazy fish, carrying a paintbrush.
LanguageData.RSMF_Collections_LazyFish.label: Lazy Fish
LanguageData.RSMF_Collections_Piano.description: A very, very, very expensive piano. Truly very expensive, but the effect of playing it is absolutely worth the price.
LanguageData.RSMF_Collections_Piano.label: Stanford Piano
LanguageData.RSMF_Collections_RandySTear.description: A strange pearl, said to have condensed from the eye of a fanatical pursuer of randomness. Without a doubt, it is priceless.
LanguageData.RSMF_Collections_RandySTear.label: Randy's Tear
A specimen of a tracker swarmer, vivid and lifelike, for research and display.
LanguageData.RSMF_Collections_TynanSHeart.description: A diamond as big as a heart and shaped like a heart, shining brightly, named 'Tynan's Heart' by an unknown discoverer. Legend says that owning this diamond will ensure your RimWorld will never be troubled by 'red text' again.
LanguageData.RSMF_Collections_TynanSHeart.label: Tynan's Heart
LanguageData.Sim_CashRegister.description: A workstation for colonists to serve customers and settle bills. Needs someone on duty to operate.
LanguageData.Sim_CashRegister.label: Shop Cash Register
LanguageData.Sim_CashRegisterMachine.description: A workstation for colonists to serve customers and settle bills. Needs someone on duty to operate.
LanguageData.Sim_CashRegisterMachine.label: Shop Cash Register
LanguageData.Sim_PaymentCode.label: Payment Code
LanguageData.Sim_ShopPopupMote.label: shop popup mote
LanguageData.Sim_SignBoard1A.label: One-tile Sign (South)
LanguageData.Sim_SignBoard1B.label: One-tile Sign (West)
LanguageData.Sim_SignBoard1C.label: One-tile Sign (East)
LanguageData.Sim_SignBoard2A.label: Two-tile Sign (South)
LanguageData.Sim_SignBoard2B.label: Two-tile Sign (West)
LanguageData.Sim_SignBoard2C.label: Two-tile Sign (East)
LanguageData.Sim_SignBoard3A.label: Three-tile Sign (South)
LanguageData.Sim_SignBoard3B.label: Three-tile Sign (West)
LanguageData.Sim_SignBoard3C.label: Three-tile Sign (East)
LanguageData.Sim_SignBoard4A.label: Four-tile Sign (South)
LanguageData.Sim_SignBoard4B.label: Four-tile Sign (West)
LanguageData.Sim_SignBoard4C.label: Four-tile Sign (East)
LanguageData.Sim_Toilet.description: A shop building providing paid toilet services. Customers will stay here for a while after payment to complete the service.
LanguageData.Sim_Toilet.label: Toilet
LanguageData.ToolsStorageBox.description: A large cabinet for store operations. It can centrally store and manage goods sold in the shop, facilitating restocking and settlement.
LanguageData.ToolsStorageBox.label: Tool Cabinet
